improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and professional guidance for your business operations. Try three searches free — no card required."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately introduces the product name and its core function, building brand recognition. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional guidance) while emphasizing the risk-free trial offer. 'No card required' removes friction and builds trust, encouraging visitors to engage before the paywall.
